chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D538 of 2021: Raja Imran Khan vs. SHO, P.S Anti- Encroachment &Others For the Petitioner: Mr. Kazim Raza Shah, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. Date of hearing: 02.02.2022. Date of announcement: 02.02.2022. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The present petition seeks declaration of title in respect of immovable property; directions with respect to construction on immovable property; and compensation. At the very onset learned counsel was confronted as to how the said relief, notwithstanding any merit, could be granted in the writ jurisdiction of this Court. Learned counsel remained unable to articulate any justification in such regard.In view of the foregoing, this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed alongwith pending application. JUDGE JUDGE
